description: The permit is to renovate 235-241 Bourbon st, which will require interior demolition of walls, floors, finishes on level 1, 2, and 3. Level one will maintain as a bar with Kitchen. Renovations on the exterior for VCC approval include... 1. PAINT EXTERIOR, CHANGE DOORS TO SWING OUTWARD, AS PER IBC OCCUPANCY REMOVE WINDOWS ON FIRST FLOOR, BIENVILLE SIDE, REPLACE WITH FRENCH DOORS WITH TRANSOM, MATCHING THOSE ON BOURBON ST. REPLACE WITH FRENCH DOORS MATCHING EXTERIOR ADDITION OF STAIR ON BIENVILLE AS PER FIRE EGRESS. ADDITION OF ELEVATOR SHAFT OVERRIDE. VISIBLE FROM BIENVILLE ST. COURTYARD. REMOVAL OF NON-HISTORIC STAIRCASE ENCLOSURE. PATCH AND FILL FLOOR TO MATCH REPLACE DOORS TO HISTORIC ADDITION OF CONDENSORS FROM BIENVILLE, AND FROM NON-HISTORIC STAIRCASE ON ROOF INSIDE COURTYARD
